emails.subject: Electricity Summit at U.C. Berkeley
emails.body: Vince, I just received this message. What do you think? Should I register to attend it? Sevil, Forwarded by Sevil Yaman/Corp/Enron on 10/24/2000 02:20 PM pwpens <pwpens@socrates.Berkeley.EDU> on 10/24/2000 12:16:14 PM

emails.subject: Re: Electricity Summit at U.C. Berkeley
emails.body: Re: Electricity Summit at U.C. Berkeley Sevil, Yes, please, go ahead. We shall pay for the trip. Vince Sevil Yaman@ENRON 10/24/2000 02:24 PM
